g.text: Calibration · Production Telemetry Refines DynoSim's Timing Model

rect.style: stroke-width: 1px; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-opacity: 0; fill: rgb(0, 0, 0); fill-opacity: 0;

g.text: Sweep in sim, verify on the cluster, calibrate from telemetry.
